SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?building ?buildingLabel ?architectLabel(YEAR(?end) - YEAR(?start) AS ?duration) WHERE {
  wd:Q1779466 wdt:P102 ?building .
  ?building rdfs:label ?buildingLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?buildingLabel) = "en")
  OPTIONAL {
    ?building wdt:P84 ?architect .
    ?architect rdfs:label ?architectLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?architectLabel) = "en")
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?building wdt:P1419 ?start .
    ?building wdt:P571 ?end .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?building
LIMIT 14
```
